app.description: AI-powered travel CMS — turn field notes into magazine-ready stories.
role.author: Author
landing.headline: AI로 필드 노트를 잡지 기사로
landing.subheadline: Upload your .docx travel notes and photos. AI structures them into polished magazine articles with source mapping.
landing.uploadModalDescription: Drop a .docx notebook and optional photos. We'll detect the language and start AI processing.
landing.heroFeatureInstantDesc: Upload .docx and get a structured draft in minutes.
landing.heroFeatureMultilingualDesc: English, Vietnamese, Japanese, Korean, and more.
landing.heroFeatureSourceDesc: Every claim links back to your original notes.
landing.globalSupportText: Multilingual support including English, Vietnamese, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Thai, Indonesian, Spanish, French, German, and more.
landing.tryDescription: Sign in, upload a .docx notebook, and watch AI build your magazine draft.
landing.previewDescription: Track drafts, source highlights, and magazine preview in one workspace.
landing.faq1A: Phase 1 supports .docx travel notes plus optional JPG, PNG, or WEBP photos.
landing.faq2A: We support 10 languages: English, Vietnamese, Japanese, Korean, Chinese, Thai, Indonesian, Spanish, French, and German.
landing.faq3A: Hover any field in the magazine preview to see which original note paragraph it came from.
landing.ctaBottom: Ready to transform your travel notes?
upload.title: Upload travel notes
upload.subtitle: Drop a .docx field notebook and optional trip photos. AI will structure it into a magazine-ready draft with source mapping.
upload.errorImage: {name}: only JPG, PNG, WEBP images allowed
upload.unsupportedLanguageBody: We could not detect a supported language in your document. Please use one of our 10 supported languages.
upload.confirmLanguageBody: We detected your notes are in {language}. The magazine article will be written in this language.
login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Mock accounts for Author, Editor, and Admin roles.
dashboard.title: Your articles
dashboard.authorHint: You can view and edit your own drafts.
dashboard.editorHint: You can review and edit all articles in the system.
processing.title: AI is processing your notes
processing.subtitle: This usually takes under a minute.
editor.heroHint: Switch tabs to view original notes, magazine article, or edit content.
editor.sourceTabHint: Original paragraphs are numbered by index — use them to trace AI sources.
editor.magazineTabHint: Hover each section to see sources below, or click "View in original notes".
editor.form.title: Title
